name: henry
description: Shop and build with Henry's agentic-commerce API: cross-merchant product search, universal carts, hosted checkout, and order tracking. Bundles the Henry MCP server plus the integrate and shop skills.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic commerce: product search, carts, checkout
interface.longDescription: Henry gives agents live commerce tools — cross-merchant product search, universal carts, and hosted checkout — plus skills that teach agents to integrate Henry into the apps they build.
defaultPrompt: Use Henry to find white sneakers under $100 and build a cart.
Use Henry to add product search and checkout to my app.
